content:
🔥 everything-ai-ml | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a structured and comprehensive collection of learning materials for individuals interested in mastering Generative AI and Machine Learning.
✨ Key Features: • Curated collection of learning resources • Covers Generative AI, Machine Learning, Agentic AI, LLMs, RAG, Fine-tuning, MLOps
📖 Summary: This repository is a comprehensive, curated collection of learning resources for Generative AI, Machine Learning, and related advanced topics. It serves as a central hub for individuals looking to deepen their understanding and skills in these rapidly evolving fields, offering a structured path from foundational concepts to advanced applications.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
